home.tagline: A field journal for every cat you meet
home.intro: Snap a photo, pin the place, jot a note — and keep a diary of every cat that's crossed your path. Track other cat spotters and read their diaries too.
home.free: Free, and your diary can stay private.
home.nextCat: The next cat you meet deserves a page.

snap.title: Snap
snap.text: Photograph any cat that crosses your path — strays, shop cats, neighbourhood regulars.

note.title: Note
note.text: Give them a name, jot down what they were up to, and pin the place. Every sighting becomes a page in your diary.

track.title: Track
track.text: Track other cat spotters, leave paw prints and margin notes, and browse their diaries in a day-by-day feed.

authLayout.title: Cat Diary
authLayout.tagline: A field journal for every cat you meet

signIn.title: Open your diary
signIn.welcome: Welcome back — the cats have missed you.

perks.log: Log every cat you meet — photos, notes, and the place you found them
perks.track: Track other cat spotters and read their diaries in a daily feed
perks.privacy: Your diary, your rules — keep it public or make it private

errors.invalidUsername: Usernames are 3-30 lowercase letters, numbers, dots or underscores.

feed.title: Cat Diary
feed.emptySubtitle: Met a cat today? Write it down.

profile.usernameHint: Your handle — used to sign in and shown when you have no display name.
profile.bioPlaceholder: A line about you and the cats you meet…

errors.invalidUsername: Usernames are 3-30 lowercase letters, numbers, dots or underscores.
errors.couldNotUpdatePrivacy: Could not update your privacy setting.

privacy.label: Private diary
privacy.description: Only approved readers can see your entries.

notifications.pushDisabled: Get alerts even when the app is closed

dangerZone.deleteConfirm: This permanently deletes your account, diary, and all entries. There is no undo.

comments.heading: Margin notes
comments.noNotes: No notes in the margins yet.
comments.scribbleNote: Scribble a note in the margin…
comments.couldNotAdd: Could not add your note. Try again.

section.title: Invite friends
section.description: Share your personal link — anyone who joins with it follows your diary from day one.
section.loadError: Could not load your invite link.
section.copyError: Could not copy automatically — please copy manually:
section.shareText: I keep a diary of the cats I meet — come read along.

landing.invalidDescription: The invite link doesn't match any diary — it may have been mistyped. You can still start a diary of your own.
landing.alreadyHave: I already have one — sign in
landing.heading: {name} invited you to Cat Diary
landing.description: A field journal for the cats you meet — photograph them, note where they crossed your path, and track other cat spotters.
landing.footerText: Join with this link and you'll track {name}'s diary from day one.

follows.noTrackers: No one is reading this diary yet.
